failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: quantitative ceiling for every searched mechanism family
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: The concurrent certificate says only >=3 of 12 families have quantitative bounds, while Return B requires family-by-family quantitative ceilings.

failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: close every active family before a terminal boundary
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: The integrated M/T/R family has 11,184,811 admissible full-horizon calendars; neither its exact frontier nor a resource-restricted PI upper ceiling has been computed.

failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: canonical full-DES evidence for the claimed searched envelope
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: The 64-cell atlas declares itself a STYLIZED two-CSSU adapter and not the full Op1-Op13 DES. It cannot certify the untested full-DES M/T/R family or other distinct mechanisms.

failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: H_obs is the maximum over admissible observable policies, not one tested policy
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: headroom_at evaluates one belief/nowcast cover rule. Its H_obs field is a tested-policy delta and therefore a lower bound on maximized H_obs, not an upper ceiling capable of closing the family.

The atlas adapter scores compute_order_level_ret_excel_formula over all generated orders with a row-index denominator. Corrective replay reproduces both reported positive cells exactly, but both increase lost orders with CI95 entirely above zero. Raw visible-ledger optimization chooses HOLD^4 because an empty visible population scores 1.0; that 64/64 zero is a shed-to-win degeneracy and explicitly is not a project H_PI ceiling.

failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: screened factors must causally enter the scored rollout
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: r22_prob is declared and sampled, but simulate_orders never consumes tape.r22. Corrective paired replay at probabilities 0 and 0.30 changes R22 arrays while producing maximum fixed-sequence score difference exactly zero across 48 tapes x 81 sequences under both formula variants. The belief policy can still change sequences through its shadow _week_step, so this does not prove the whole tested-policy statistic invariant.

failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: uncertainty, resources, guardrails and null-cell evidence for any headroom screen
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: The atlas stores point estimates of H_PI, H_obs and eta but no confidence intervals, per-cell resource ledger, lost-order result, worst-CSSU result, tail-risk result or explicit null-physics cell.

The atlas names a periodic calendar and a belief/nowcast policy, but does not provide a certified all-open-loop bound or approximation gap for each cell and does not audit the complete comparator family required by the task.

The atlas provides no exact command manifest, dependency snapshot, per-tape seed manifest, contract/code hash, stdout/stderr log or checksum-indexed partial results. Referenced figure and regression-test files are absent from the audited commit.

The atlas says it opened seed block 7,200,001+, but the concurrent seed-burn ledger does not record that block. The same ledger also labels already opened K3 6,800,001 and 6,900,001 blocks as known virgin.

The concurrent synthesis combines a restricted 10/14-day DRA2 oracle gap with Program E observable-policy results from a different restricted contract/resource setup. Those values cannot form a same-contract H_PI-to-H_obs conversion estimate.
The claim of 49 agents and 2.9M tokens has no committed task registry, raw reports, hashes or executable synthesis checks. It is provenance metadata, not machine evidence.

failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: no theorem-strength invariant without a proved scope
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: Claims such as global maximal-readiness optimality, periodic-calendar sufficiency and restoration-order invariance are stated as envelope-closing invariants without machine proofs covering every allowed action, topology and canonical-ledger consequence.

failed_terminal_B_requirements.requirement: Paper 3 retained learning remains prohibited until a learned Paper 2 win
failed_terminal_B_requirements.evidence: The concurrent strategy recommends a different constructive-inverse study as Paper 3. That may be future publication strategy, but it is not the retained-learning estimand authorized by this task and cannot satisfy the requested Paper 3 return condition.
The certificate says the K3 correction still needs to be pushed, but the audited commit itself was pushed and contains ef6b53b7 as an ancestor; its required provenance action is now stale.

allowed_scientific_use: The concurrent candidate registry is exploratory theory-screen input.

The stylized atlas is an exploratory tested-policy screen only; it is not canonical visible-ledger H_obs and requires metric, factor-liveness, execution, comparator and guardrail repair before boundary use.
The commit does not authorize virgin confirmation, learner training, Paper 2 success or Paper 3 retained learning.
exact_evidence_needed_to_reverse_this_au: Compute or rigorously upper-bound the integrated M/T/R resource-restricted full-horizon PI frontier under frozen reserve semantics.
Provide a quantitative ceiling, with declared scope and proof or reproducible computation, for every family included in Return B.
Repair tape-burn, comparator, resource, guardrail and execution manifests for every numerical artifact used by the terminal claim.
